results.rendered_html: lekhārha or lekhār˚hya, m. ‘fit for writing’, a kind of palm-tree (the leaves of which are used for writing on),  L.

lekhārha m. = śrītāla eine Palmenart (auf deren Blättern geschrieben wird)  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.  lekhārhya in der alphabetischen Ordnung, lekhārha unter śrītāla.
— Vgl. lekhyapattra.
